title: Uppu Huli Khara

title: The Villain
subTitle: Ramu sets out to find his estranged brother, Rama, to reunite him with their mother. However, Ramu soon discovers that Rama is a mafia don, which makes it difficult for Ramu to approach his brother.

title: Ghost
subTitle: A gangster and his team hijack a prison in the city on a quest for justice. They threaten to release all the criminals.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: Devi Shetty, a cruel gangster, is out to plunder a village's oil resources and ruin its inhabitants' livelihood. However, the son-in-law of the village head, Krishna, stands in his way.

subTitle: Shivaji, a policeman, sets out to investigate a high-profile murder of a minister's son. However, while pursuing the leads, he must also deal with his own wife's death.

title: Bangarada Kalla
subTitle: A corrupt landlord is involved in gold smuggling, while the police try to apprehend the culprit. However, he is unaware that a person close to him plans to expose his illegal activities.

title: Teleshopping

title: Howla Howla
subTitle: A few college students go to a guest house after their exams. The ghost of a medical student, who is a diehard fan of Kannada actor Vishnuvardhan, follows them and torments them.

title: Dakota Express
subTitle: Owners of a bus, Krishna and Sundar, face numerous problems due to poor conditions. However, their life takes a turn when the daughter of the minister takes refuge in their bus.

title: Putnanja
subTitle: Putnanja, a poor farmer, falls in love with Roja, a city-bred woman. They get married despite opposition from her mother, but differences soon crop up between them.

title: Preethse
subTitle: Surya, a military commander, is soon to be engaged to Kiran, a college student. Unbeknownst to him, one of Kiran's classmates is also in love with her.

title: Hebbuli
subTitle: In order to uncover the truth behind his brother's death, Ram investigates the case but faces several obstacles as he attempts to fight against the corrupt system and protect his family.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.

title: Athi Aparoopa
subTitle: Upset due to his father's remarriage, Bharath leaves home. Eventually, he meets Aparna, a beautiful woman, and falls in love with her, unaware of her secret.

title: Womens Day
subTitle: Five childhood friends reunite years later for Women's Day but get stranded in a deserted bungalow. Subsequently, a series of eerie and unexplained events unfold.

title: Mugilpete

title: Mufti
subTitle: Gana, a police officer, must go undercover to find and kill Bhairathi Ranagal, a crime lord. However, when he realises that Bhairathi's intentions are good, he needs to decide his next step.

title: VR: Vikrant Rona 3D
subTitle: When Vikrant Rona sets off to investigate a gruesome murder, a series of tragic deaths leads him to discover a supernatural connection. With varying signals and clues, Vikrant must find the killer.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Zombie Kumar
subTitle: A video game developer and his companions travel to a village to attend their friend's wedding. However, their holiday turns into a nightmare due to a sudden zombie apocalypse.
